title: PMS Removable Round Silver Hooks-3.4cm x 3.4cm, Pack of 3, 3.4 cm x 3.4 cm
features: STYLISH ROUND SILVER HOOKS: Enhance your home décor with these sleek and modern removable round hooks, measuring 3.4cm x 3.4cm for the perfect fit in any room or space.
STRONG & VERSATILE: Designed to hold up to 1.5kg with ease, these hooks are perfect for hanging anything from keys and jackets to kitchen utensils and towels, making organization a breeze.

EFFORTLESS REMOVAL & REUSABILITY: Easily remove these hooks without damaging walls or surfaces, ensuring you can rearrange and reuse them as needed to suit your evolving storage and organization needs.
PACK OF 3: Sold in a convenient pack of 3, these hooks offer an affordable solution for keeping multiple rooms neat and tidy, without compromising on style or functionality.

IDEAL FOR HOME USE: Transform your living space with these versatile silver hooks that boast a sleek design, reliable strength, and removable convenience, making them the perfect addition to any home organization system.
description: Presenting our removable round silver hooks, perfect for your home organization needs. With dimensions of 3.4cm x 3.4cm and sold in a handy pack of 3, these hooks offer versatility in placement and usage. Crafted with robustness in mind, each hook can hold up to an impressive 1.5kg of weight. Their clean, silver aesthetic blends seamlessly into any decor, ensuring your home stays tidy without compromising on style. Whether it's for hanging keys, utensils, or small decor pieces, these hooks provide an effective solution for keeping your space clutter-free and well-organized.
